title: DALL·E 3 對話式繪圖與精確修補
prompt:
# Codex PPT Slide Image Prompt

## Canvas
{
  "type": "16:9 full-slide PowerPoint image",
  "language": "Chinese",
  "slide_number": 94,
  "render_slide_number": false
}

## Deck Goal
Redesign AI-assisted teaching slides to be the most comprehensive guide based on original PDF.

## Required Background
{
  "deck_context": {
    "source_summary": "Extensive presentation on using AI/IA tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, NotebookLM, Felo Search) in high school biology teaching, homeroom, administration, question generation, and grading.",
    "core_claim": "AI should serve as an amplifier for teachers (Intelligence Augmentation) rather than just simple automation.",
    "canonical_terms": [
      "IA",
      "智能增強",
      "生物教學",
      "NotebookLM",
      "Felo Search",
      "Kahoot",
      "Quizizz"
    ]
  }
}

## Global Style
{
  "name": "清爽專業風",
  "visual_direction": "clean modern professional deck, calm technical presentation, structured evidence-driven layout, readable pragmatic visual system, light background with crisp hierarchy",
  "color_palette": "Lishan Green (forest green #1E5631) and Tech Blue (#2563EB) primary brand colors on warm white background",
  "typography": "clear bold sans-serif, report-like and authoritative Chinese typography"
}

## Style Reference Images To Inspect

- Style Reference 1: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0-AI輔助教學/AI_Teaching_Deck/origin_image/slide_03.png — approved sample slide style reference; match style only; do not copy layout or content

Inspect these images before generation to understand the approved deck style. Do not pass them to the image backend as input images unless this slide explicitly lists them under Input Images.

## Input Images

- Image 1: /Users/froglssh/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-frog@lssh.tp.edu.tw/我的雲端硬碟/0AI應用/0-AI輔助教學/AI_Teaching_Deck/assets/extracted/page_96_img_1.png — extracted source image asset; preserve visual layout and content reference


## Slide
{
  "number": 94,
  "title": "DALL·E 3 對話式繪圖與精確修補",
  "role": "tutorial",
  "intent": null
}

## Text
{
  "title": "DALL·E 3 對話式繪圖與精確修補",
  "key_points": [
    "專準描述：使用詳細提示詞（包含主體、顏色、排版、背景、風格）生成初始圖",
    "局部修圖 (Inpainting)：點擊生成的圖片，使用畫筆選取特定區域（例如：把圖中的貓改為狗），輸入修改指令，即可在保持背景不變的情況下進行局部修改",
    "效益：徹底解決 AI 繪圖「一次不滿意就要整張重畫」的痛點"
  ],
  "speaker_focus": null
}

## Style Reference Rule
Use the approved sample-slide style reference as visual guidance only. Match its palette, typography mood, density, texture, and overall visual identity. Do not copy its exact layout unless this slide's layout explicitly asks for it. For normal new slide generation, use the generate endpoint and express the inspected style through the prompt instead of attaching the sample as an edit input.

## Input Image Handling Rules
For any input image marked as a strict input asset, include it visibly and preserve its content. Do not redraw, replace, relabel, or invent a similar figure. Scale and crop only as needed for composition while keeping the important labels, arrows, data, and relationships recognizable.

## Universal Constraints
- The final image itself must contain the title and key points.
- Render Chinese text exactly and legibly; avoid garbled characters.
- Keep the confirmed deck style consistent while varying layout by slide role.
- No watermark, unrelated logo, or extra slide number.
